title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, York, Ivankov, Kizaru, Unknown person #12 as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Rebecca, DAT's the BADDIE from Before!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, Mjosgard, I can hit him, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By all means! I'll take full respondi- bility!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But a Royal Like You Must Show Restraint, Prince Fukabosh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mjosgard, you hit me earlier!! How could you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't just sit back and let him treat our little sister like that....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: escaping is easier for them! They don't have a country to think about!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That must've killed him. We all saw it happen!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: An Admiral's gonna show up for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't have to listen to anyone's orders anymore! It's okay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's going on?! How did a giant get here?!

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: Morley, I've got the keys from SABO.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hang on? Is he an intruder?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's a captain in the revolution- tipnary army!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Look how they massaced my boy!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
